mapper.sql: id, project_code, customer_id, project_name, project_type, description, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, current_phase, status, manager_id, progress, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM project WHERE project_code = #{projectCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM project WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM project WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT CONCAT('P', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), LPAD(COUNT(*) + 1, 4, '0')) FROM project WHERE DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m')

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled_count, AVG(progress) as avg_progress, SUM(contract_amount) as total_contract_amount FROM project WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) as project_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_count, SUM(contract_amount) as total_contract_amount, AVG(progress) as avg_progress FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY customer_id
SELECT current_phase as phase, COUNT(*) as count FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'active' GROUP BY current_phase ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT
FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'active' AND end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY end_date ASC

SELECT
FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'active' AND progress < 50 AND end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) ORDER BY progress ASC, end_date ASC
